segments.text: Listen to this word which I take up for a lamentation over you, O house of Israel:
The virgin of Israel has fallen; She shall rise no more. She is cast down on her land; there is no one to raise her up.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For the Lord Yahweh says:
The city that went out a thousand shall have a hundred left, and that which went out one hundred shall have ten left to the house of Israel.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: For Yahweh says to the house of Israel:
Seek me, and you will live;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
but don’t seek Bethel, nor enter into Gilgal, 
and don’t pass to Beersheba; for Gilgal shall surely go into captivity, and Bethel shall come to nothing.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Seek Yahweh, and you will live, lest he break out like fire in the house of Joseph, 
and it devour, and there be no one to quench it in Bethel.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: You who turn justice to wormwood, and cast down righteousness to the earth!
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Seek him who made the Pleiades and Orion, and turns the shadow of death into the morning, 
and makes the day dark with night; 
who calls for the waters of the sea, 
and pours them out on the surface of the earth, Yahweh is his name,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: who brings sudden destruction on the strong, so that destruction comes on the fortress.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: They hate him who reproves in the gate, and they abhor him who speaks blamelessly.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore, because you trample on the poor and take taxes from him of wheat, you have built houses of cut stone, but you will not dwell in them. You have planted pleasant vineyards, but you shall not drink their wine.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
For I know how many are your offenses, and how great are your sins—
you who afflict the just, 
who take a bribe, 
and who turn away the needy in the courts.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore a prudent person keeps silent in such a time, for it is an evil time.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
Yahweh

segments.text:
Hate evil, love good, and establish justice in the courts. 
It may be that Yahweh, the God of Armies, will be gracious to the remnant of Joseph.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore Yahweh, the God of Armies, the Lord, says:

Wailing will be in all the wide ways. They will say in all the streets, ‘Alas! Alas!’
They will call the farmer to mourning, 
and those who are skillful in lamentation to wailing.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: In all vineyards there will be wailing, for I will pass through the middle of you,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Woe to you who desire the day of Yahweh! Why do you long for the day of Yahweh? It is darkness, and not light.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: As if a man fled from a lion, and a bear met him; or he went into the house and leaned his hand on the wall, and a snake bit him.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Won’t the day of Yahweh be darkness, and not light? Even very dark, and no brightness in it?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I hate, I despise your feasts, and I can’t st and your solemn assemblies.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Yes, though you offer me your burnt offerings and meal offerings, I will not accept them; 
neither will I regard the peace offerings of your fat animals.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Take away from me the noise of your songs! I will not listen to the music of your harps.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: But let justice roll on like rivers, and righteousness like a mighty stream.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Did you bring to me sacrifices and offerings in the wilderness forty years, house of Israel?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: You also carried the tent of your king and the shrine of your images, the star of your god, which you made for yourselves.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore I will cause you to go into captivity beyond Damascus,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh, whose name is the God of Armies.
